svg.title: CI/CD Pipeline Diagram - Delivery Platform System (v5.0 - Definitive)

g.text: CI/CD Pipeline Diagram - Delivery Platform System (v5.0 - Definitive)
Only builds and tests the specific services
or apps that were modified, to keep pipelines
Ensures docs stay in sync with releases (NFR-14).
Uses k6 or JMeter scripts stored in repo.
Uses a centralized feature flag service
Only Lead Developer / CTO can approve.
Scans for known CVEs in base images
Image tag is immutable Git commit SHA.
Secrets are injected from a vault
track with beta testing before store
If health checks fail, Helm automatically
rolls back to the previous stable revision,
Helm upgrade with new image tag
